title: Cashier and waiter
jobapply_link: mailto:ekertamer1@gmail.com?subject=Application for the Job - Kassatyöntekijä ja tarjolija
jobcontent:
We are looking for a cashier for our lunch restaurant. Duties include working at the cash register, customer service and taking care of the cleanliness of the hall. Duties also include maintaining the cleanliness of the customers' tables, such as collecting dishes and trays and cleaning the tables. Working hours are 9-14 on weekdays

You can send your resume and work experience letter by e-mail. If the criteria are met, we will contact you by email and arrange a personal interview later.
translated_content:
Cashier and waiter

We are looking for a cashier for our lunch restaurant. Duties include working at the cash register, customer service and taking care of the cleanliness of the hall. Duties also include maintaining the cleanliness of the customers' tables, such as collecting dishes and trays and cleaning the tables. Working hours are 9-14 on weekdays

You can send your resume and work experience letter by e-mail. If the criteria are met, we will contact you by email and arrange a personal interview later.

title: Lettukafila hostess
jobcontent:

title: Family caregiver (gig job), Onnikoti Aalto, Pori
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
Family caregiver (gig job), Onnikoti Aalto, Pori

Come and do guidance work for people with intellectual disabilities at the unique group facility Onnikoti Aalto, Pori!

We are now looking for caregivers for temporary work in our new, beautiful and modern home. Become an enabler of a good everyday life for us!

Where do you come to work?
We are opening a new Housing Unit for adults with developmental disabilities in the Tikkula district of Pori in the spring of 2026. Onnikoti Aalto will offer 24-hour serviced housing for 14 people and community housing for 7 people. The services are produced in new facilities designed for the purpose. Accessibility and comfort have been taken into account in the design of the facilities.

What can you do?
With us, you can influence the operation of our home based on Onnikotien's values ​​and quality promises. Our goal is an individual, safe and good everyday life for every resident. You get to do everyday nursing work and develop our unit's operations in cooperation with other team members. Our daily life is functional and we constantly organize activities for our residents.

who are you
You are a nurse by training. A person with a positive attitude and self-initiative who is genuinely interested in working with people with intellectual disabilities will be most comfortable in our company. Knowledge of working with people with intellectual disabilities is considered an advantage.

Why would you come to work for us?
In the new unit, you will be able to participate in building and developing our operations from the beginning, also as a gig worker. At Onnikoti Aalto, you will be part of a coal-breathing work community where work is done with a positive attitude and respect for everyone. Every employee is introduced to the job at the beginning of the employment relationship.

The work is shift work and the salary for the position is in accordance with G20C of the TES of the private social service sector. The job requires vaccination protection according to the Infectious Diseases Act.

In accordance with the Act on Social and Health Care Supervision, those working with elderly or disabled persons who are selected for the position must present the criminal record extract referred to in section 6, subsection 2 of the Criminal Records Act.

Apply for a position through our recruitment system as soon as possible, but no later than April 17, 2026. 

I will be happy to tell you more:
Unit manager Veera Vanhatalo
tel. 040 684 5004 (weekdays at 816)
veera.vanhatalo@onnikodit.fi

A home full of unique joy of life.

At Onnikodes, we offer those in need of support a home where they can live as fulfilling and safe everyday life as possible. We invest in individuality and quality, and the starting point of our service is always the resident's own unique characteristics, strengths, interests and support needs.

Onnikodit is a part of Mehiläinen. The professionals of Mehiläinen's social and health services work uncompromisingly for the benefit of our private, corporate and welfare area customers every day. Welcome to strengthen our team of professionals!

title: Foreman in Kotka
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: A valid work safety and electrical work safety card
The possibility of using your own car is considered an advantage
At least one year of experience in the electrical field
what_we_offer: Versatile tasks in a growing company in the field
A good and relaxed work team
For a good worker, the opportunity for a longer-term employment relationship
The opportunity to develop as an expert in the field
Please submit your application as soon as possible, as the position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.
We supply professional personnel with 25 years of experience to various industries.
jobcontent:
Become a foreman for us!

We are looking for a motivated foreman for versatile projects for our client.

You have the opportunity to develop your professional skills in interesting tasks. At work, you get to perform the tasks of a foreman in a versatile destination, surrounded by a comfortable and relaxed work team. You can already be an experienced conker or, for example, a graduating engineer who is looking for work experience in tasks in the field. The works are located in the Kotka area.

Success at work requires:

 * Electrical training 
 * Valid work safety and electrical work safety card
 * A brisk and self-initiated attitude
 * The possibility of using your own car is considered an advantage
 * At least one year of experience in the electrical field
 * Good IT skills

We offer you:

 * Varied tasks in a growing company in the field
 * A good and relaxed work team 
 * For a good worker, the possibility of a longer-term employment relationship
 * The opportunity to develop as an expert in the field
 * Comprehensive orientation

Please submit your application as soon as possible, as the position will be filled as soon as a suitable person is found.

We supply professional personnel with 25 years of experience to various industries.

We are a responsible operator and we always comply with the general binding collective agreement according to the customer's industry and valid legislation. Our strengths are especially reliability, speed and reliability. As an employer, we are reliable and flexible, and we support you in all the different stages of your working life.<https://rekrymesta.fi/>

title: HVAC installer
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
job_responsibilities: industrial heating, air conditioning and cooling system installer
what_we_offer: Please send your application as soon as possible, because we are already interviewing applicants during the application period. The position will be filled when a suitable person is found.
You can also call and ask for more information about the position: Ville Myller, tel. +358 400 486 904
jobcategory_keywords: heating, ventilation and air conditioning mechanic
heating, ventilation, air conditioning (and refrigeration) service engineer
jobcontent:
HVAC installer/HVAC Service Myller Oy
 
Hello, you HVAC installation professional! Are you ready to jump into an exciting and developing job, where your skills are valued and your strengths are taken into account?

Task/who we are looking for:
LVI-Palvelu Myller Oy is looking for an experienced and competent HVAC installer in the PK region to carry out versatile pipe installation work. We require the applicant to have two years of HVAC work experience in maintenance and renovation projects, the ability to work independently, and a professional degree in the field.
We value self-initiatives and an active approach to work in the applicant. We also expect the applicant to be enthusiastic about learning new things and have sufficient Finnish language skills. The work is mobile (in the PK region) and a B driver's license is necessary.

What we offer:
We offer the employee an encouraging salary and flexible work. In your work, you get the opportunity to develop your professional skills in a versatile way. We also offer a service car equipped with high-quality tools for your own use. You will become part of a very nice work team and an organization that wants to grow. LVI-Palvelu Myller Oy is a supportive employer that takes good care of its employees. We have a small, competent and lively work community where we also have fun.

About us:
LVI-Palvelu Myller Oy has versatile and strong know-how related to pipe repairs, contracting and HVAC maintenance work in properties. We use modern and high-quality technology in our work. We also have class A district heating and contractor rights. We do our work with strong professionalism in almost all aspects of HVAC building technology.
 
Send your application by email to: ville.myller@lvipm.fi 
Please send your application as soon as possible, because we are already interviewing applicants during the application period. The position will be filled when a suitable person is found.
You can also call and ask for more information about the position: Ville Myller, tel. +358 400 486 904
Check out our website: https://lvi-palvelumyller.fi

Send your application and CV by email to ville.myller@lvipm.fi
